---
title: "Tools"
---

# 🧮 Financial Engineering Tools

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth develops interactive financial and economic tools designed to help users understand investing, inflation, valuation, and long-term wealth creation.

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 📈 Compound Interest Calculator

Model investment growth, savings accumulation, and long-term portfolio expansion over time.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 💱 Currency Conversion Tools

Compare African currencies against USD and evaluate purchasing power changes across markets.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 📊 Valuation Tools

Analyze companies using ratios, discounted cash flow methods, and financial statement metrics.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌍 Inflation & Cost-of-Living Dashboards

Track inflation impact, commodity pricing, and purchasing power trends across African economies.

</div>

</div>

---

## Future Platform Features

<div class="glass-card">

Planned tools and dashboards include:

- Reverse compound interest calculators
- Portfolio allocation dashboards
- BRVM and NGX stock screeners
- Inflation heatmaps
- Market volatility indicators
- Economic comparison dashboards
- Financial ratio explainers
- Interactive market intelligence APIs

</div>
